request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how over-reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. The recent cyberattacks on our infrastructure prove we can't afford to wait. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about ensuring we have the tools to protect ourselves when allies might not be there. Our preparedness today means fewer sacrifices tomorrow. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
